PreToolUse.description: Block MCP actuation calls targeting sensitive HA entities. Covers every HA MCP tool (incl. script-derived tools, which carry no entity_id); the read-only GetLiveContext/GetDateTime tools are allowlisted inside the gate. Tool IDs assume the HA MCP Server is registered in Claude Code as 'homeassistant'.
Auto-approve curl/wget calls whose command string contains a known HA URL (from .env). All other Bash commands pass through unchanged.
